commit.description: Nothing reaches ConfigureOne Cloud until you commit. Review your draft summary — product setup, options, interface logic, and bill of material — then push everything in a single operation.
commit.title: Ready to commit

files.description: Drag in product manuals, spec sheets, nomenclature pages, selection tables, BOMs, or input value spreadsheets. The agent reads, analyzes, and extracts configurable structure from your documents.
files.title: No files yet

graph.description: Interactive graph view is only available on staging.
graph.title: Graph view

model.description: A product represents an entire configurable product line. Each product option consists of an input and input values, organized into input groups. Upload files to generate the model.
model.title: No product options

preview.description: The configuration interface displays product options to customers. Each variation of a product is called a configuration. Build a model to preview the interface your customers will use.
preview.title: No preview available

results.description: Product outputs are the end-results generated for each configuration — a list of inputs and selected values, a bill of material, CAD drawings, PDF documents, and driven outputs.
results.title: No results yet

rules.description: Logic items control which inputs are displayed and in what order. They use conditional logic to show, hide, lock, or set values. Driven inputs, input filters, iterators, and equations define constraints and calculations.
rules.title: No interface logic

verify.description: Test your product setup to highlight areas for improvement — the sequence of inputs, aesthetic issues, naming convention compliance, and configuration trouble spots.
verify.title: Verification

steps.agent: Hi — I’m your C1C admin agent. Before we dig in, tell me about your company. A URL works, or type a few sentences — whatever’s easiest.
steps.placeholder: Type, paste a URL, or attach a file…

steps.agent: I need a bit more context about your industry to get started. Can you confirm or correct what I’ve found?
Tell me about yourself — what’s your role, and will anyone else be using this workspace?
All set. I’ve saved your context to the workspace:
